---
applyTo: "backend/**"
---
<!-- Generated by scripts/sync_agent_adapters.py from scripts/agent_adapter_manifest.json. Do not edit manually. -->
- Read backend/AGENTS.md for backend-specific rules.
- All AI calls go through core_ai.py - never import google.generativeai directly.
- Use Depends(database.get_db) for DB sessions in routes.
- Update models.py, schemas.py, and main.py migration/startup logic together for schema changes.
- Prompts are version-controlled in prompt_registry.py.
- HIPAA: Health data must be scoped to current_user.id.
